name_en: .(Includes full packaging)!!️Gucci Logo Long Card Holder. The men's series daily accessory is renewed with classic blue leather. The 2024 Early Spring series reinterprets classic accessories with the Gucci letter logo, cleverly showing the brand's logo connotation. This long card holder has eight card slots and two bill slots inside. Blue leather, cloud print fabric lining, Gucci logo, interior: eight card slots and two bill slots.

Model: 771159.
Open dimensions: 12cm(L) x 15cm(W)
Closed dimensions: 12cm(L) x 7.5cm(W)
Color: Blue/Original Leather.
